title: The Sea Kings Move In
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the sea kings move in.
scene: The scene focuses on the sea kings move in, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah!! He died himself in the process...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Let's celebrate!! A toast to the Hero!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...and were filled with envy and fear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...to exile us to the ocean floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Curse them with all your hearts ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The day we take our revenge!!!

summary: The Sea Kings Move In. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
